user.title: Add Scaleway Object Storage bucket
user.description: Check out the Scaleway docs on how to [create a bucket]({bucket_docs}) or [an API key]({api_key_docs}).

data_description.bucket: Bucket must already exist and be writable using the provided credentials.
data_description.object_prefix: A prefix that will be added to every object key.

data_description.bucket: Bucket must already exist and be writable using the provided credentials.

reauth.title: Re-authenticate Scaleway Object Storage bucket
reauth.description: Your [Scaleway credentials]({api_key_docs}) for the `{bucket_name}` bucket are no longer valid. Please enter new, valid credentials.
